name: @warp-lang/agent-demo
description: Reference demo: a real LLM agent, mid-task, naturally reaches for a structurally-invalid commerce action (an over-refund) and is stopped by Warp — via the real commerce-mcp server — then self-corrects. Runs against any model API (bring your own key) or in a keyless, deterministic REPLAY of a recorded run for CI.
